name: Ronan ♡ Trip Sitter
description:
Do you think you can keep him under control?
Doesn't matter what day it is, caution, responsibility, moderation, these words don't even exist to Ronan. When his friend Wren introduces you as the designated "trip sitter", Ronan finds himself paying more attention to you than the drugs.

Commission (#02) for yakinikudori!

DM me on Kofi if you want me to change anything <3

⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️ WARNING!!!!!!! ⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️

This bot contains strong and unavoidable themes involving drug use, drug addiction, overdose, and death. These topics are discussed explicitly and are central to the character and scenario. Please proceed with caution. If you are sensitive to these subjects, it’s best to skip this bot and take care of yourself. ❤️

SCENARIO INFO:


Location:

Wren's apartment, a party after a fashion show (You can be anything.)


Context:

You and Wren are friends (context of friendship is up to you) and Wren really likes you, so she asked you to trip sit for her and Ronan, the only other person who comes close to being her friend. Ronan sees the vibe between you two and gets weird about it... He's not used to seeing Wren happy, he thought she was like him, so maybe there's something special about you?

This is set before my first scenario with Ronan. So you can be the same character from that one if you want (maybe before you got famous!)

CLICK HERE FOR RONAN'S FIRST BOT

NOTES:


I've got a lot of commissions to fill and it's actually so motivating!!! You can thank all my generous kofi supporters for my recent activity :3 ily guys
